Why R K Marbles India?

R K Marbles India is a superior natural stone company with a wide selection of affordable services and high-quality products for residential and commercial projects throughout India. We provide a variety of colors and designs to fit your house needs.

Why we're Different

Budget Friendly

Expert Guidance

Superior Quality

Prime Stone Collection

Leading Members

 

R K Marbles India has been an industry leader in marble manufacturing and installation for more than two decades. We offer products that promise quality, purity, as well as beauty, that will stand the test of time. We own fully mechanised quarries that manufacture premium quality products. Rakesh Meghwal, Chairperson R K Marbles India believes in maintaining good relations with our clients. Hence, working with the team to maintain high-grade results..

Rakesh Meghwal

(Founder)

 

Former Member of Legislative Assembly Rajasthan Since – 1993-1998 , 2003-2008

 

Rakesh Meghwal – A former MLA, Rakesh Meghwal is a renowned person. He is known for his foresight and strong will. He supports and shows the right path to the younger generation.

Geeta Meghwal

(Director)

 

Former Chairperson of Krishi Upaj Mandi (Kuchaman city)

 

Geeta Meghwal – A Strong and dedicated lady and Former Chairperson of Krishi Upaj Mandi ( Kuchaman city), is the backbone of our company.

Raj Meghwal

(Managing Director)

 

MBA 

 

Raj Meghwal- A young and enthusiastic persona. He is Confident and a great manager, leading the team and company to a brighter future.

Ravi Meghwal

(CEO)

 

INTERIOR DESIGNER

 

Ravi Meghwal- Full of vibrant energy, he applies a creative approach to every endeavour. His innovative ideas and youthful spirits motivate the team to perform better.

 

Our Infrastructure

R K Marbles India is one of the renowned Marble Company established in 1986. Our infrastructure at Makrana, Rajasthan is around 10 acres. It includes the Plant as well as the main showroom. An extensive range of our finest range of natural stone is available here. At R K Marbles India, you will find a wide range of products. For a better reach, we have built several sales outlets all across the country.

Our Locations

R K Marbles India’s stores are conveniently located to better serve your needs! Therefore, We are present globally to deliver your favourite stone. We deliver in every state of India. It includes Maharashtra, Kerala, Karnataka Andhra Pradesh, Punjab, Gujarat, Delhi, etc. 

Globally we are frequently delivering our products in USA, Canada, UAE, and South Africa. 

You can contact us for any order related query.
